seoTitle: Millers Point vs Millfield — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Millers Point and Millfield. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Millers Point vs Millfield: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Millers Point and Millfield.
heading: Millers Point vs Millfield — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Millers Point, New South Wales and Millfield, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Millers Point has a lower overall climate risk score (46/100) compared to Millfield (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Millers Point or Millfield safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Millers Point has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Millfield scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Millers Point scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Millfield scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Millers Point or Millfield?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Millers Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
